# Eight Sleep MCP
Unofficial MCP server for connecting AI agents to the Eight Sleep mobile-app API.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/eight-sleep-mcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/eight-sleep
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/eight-sleep-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=eight-sleep-mcp-unofficial -- eight-sleep-mcp-unofficial doctor
MCP command: eight-sleep-mcp-unofficial
Agent surfaces:
- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/eight-sleep-mcp
- Start with eight_sleep_connection_status, then eight_sleep_data_inventory or eight_sleep_get_me.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
- Mutation tools (set_temperature, set_side, set_away_mode, snooze/dismiss alarm) require EIGHT_SLEEP_ALLOW_MUTATIONS=true.
Safety:
- Do not paste account credentials, access tokens, API keys or raw private exports into chat.
- Keep local config (~/.eight-sleep-mcp/) and generated data out of git.
- Treat outputs as wellness context, not medical advice.
- This connector talks to private Eight Sleep endpoints; endpoints may change without notice.
